description: An excellent combination of superior technology and style, the Miles from lotto keep your feet dry and comfortable all day. Slip into these shoes during your training sessions or chill in them while out with your friends.Upper Synthetic upper with stitch detailing for lightweight durability Central lacing to lock the foot in place Lightly padded collar for snug Fit Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for all day in-step comfort Phylon midsole for lightweight feel Outsole Ridges below the arch of the foot for ergonomic fit Circular lugs placed strategically for excellent grip on any terrain Horizontal and vertical flex grooves for flexible movement of the feet shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
